case_title: BRIAN BERNBAUM VS. NEWEN VENTURES LLC

docket_entries.description: ORDER SC-105A REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER IS DENIED. (PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FILED ON MAY 11, 2021)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BERNBAUM, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT NEWEN VENTURES LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERNBAUM, BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWEN VENTURES LLC $4,210.55 PRINCIPAL, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,485.55, FEES REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE PROOF OF SERVICE FEES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SC-105 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNBAUM, BRIAN
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR. ELAINE WEN, MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT NEWEN VENTURES LLC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2021 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-02-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. 863821 - PLAINTIFF BRIAN BERNBAUM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NEWEN VENTURES LLC, REPRESENTED BY ELAINE WEN, MANAGER IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF RETURNS TO DEFENDANT A CHECK FOR THE AMOUNT OF $3,484.00 TO DEFENDANT IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
